mapper.sql: id, apply_no, applicant_id, applicant_dept_id, approver_id, apply_type, title, reason, start_time, end_time, duration_hours, status, current_node, approved_at, is_deleted, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO flow_apply (apply_no, applicant_id, applicant_dept_id, approver_id, apply_type, title, reason, start_time, end_time, duration_hours, status, current_node, approved_at, is_deleted, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{applyNo}, #{applicantId}, #{applicantDeptId}, #{approverId}, #{applyType}, #{title}, #{reason}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{durationHours}, #{status}, #{currentNode}, #{approvedAt}, #{isDeleted}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT FROM flow_apply WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT FROM flow_apply WHERE apply_no = #{applyNo} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE flow_apply SET status = #{status}, approved_at = #{approvedAt}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT fa.id, fa.apply_no AS applyNo, fa.apply_type AS applyType, fa.title, fa.reason, fa.duration_hours AS durationHours, fa.status, fa.current_node AS currentNode, fa.applicant_id AS applicantId, fa.applicant_dept_id AS applicantDeptId, fa.approver_id AS approverId, fa.start_time AS startTime, fa.end_time AS endTime, fa.approved_at AS approvedAt, fa.created_at AS createdAt FROM flow_apply fa WHERE fa.id = #{id} AND fa.is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE flow_apply SET title = #{title}, reason = #{reason}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, duration_hours = #{durationHours}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT FROM flow_apply WHERE status = 'PENDING' AND created_at < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{timeoutHours} HOUR) AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE flow_apply SET is_deleted = 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
